title: FINOS AIR Control Requirement Schema
description: JSON Schema for FINOS AIR (AI Risks) Framework control requirements for MCP architectures

control-id.description: Unique identifier for the AIR control (e.g., AIR-PREV-001, AIR-DET-004)

category.description: Control category within the AIR framework

description.description: Detailed description of what the control addresses

reference-url.description: URL to the AIR framework mitigation or threat documentation

threats-mitigated.description: List of AIR threat IDs this control mitigates

implementation-requirements.description: Specific implementation requirements and configuration for this control
